title: Customer Support: Triage -> Billing -> Refund -> Supervisor
command:
pip install handoffkit
handoffkit init support-escalation
cd support-escalation
python support_escalation.py
handoffkit report runs/latest
pain: Support handoffs lose policy checks, charge IDs, and what was promised to the customer.
free_text_summary: Looks like duplicate billing. Refund team should handle it and maybe tell customer.

handoffs.task: Resolve a duplicate-charge refund escalation with audit trail.
handoffs.summary: Customer reports duplicate annual subscription charge after plan upgrade.
decisions: Classify as billing escalation, not technical support.
Verify charge IDs before promising refund.
Keep customer tone apologetic and specific.
errors: Customer attached one receipt but mentions two bank entries.
next_steps: Review charge IDs ch_001 and ch_002
Check whether upgrade proration created the second charge

handoffs.task: Resolve a duplicate-charge refund escalation with audit trail.
handoffs.summary: Two captures found within 3 minutes; second capture matches duplicate renewal.
decisions: Refund second capture only.
Do not cancel active subscription.
Add goodwill credit because customer contacted within 24 hours.
errors: First lookup used invoice ID instead of charge ID; corrected query.
next_steps: Draft customer response with refund ETA

handoffs.task: Resolve a duplicate-charge refund escalation with audit trail.
handoffs.summary: Refund prepared for duplicate charge ch_002 with account note and customer response.
decisions: Supervisor approval required because amount exceeds auto-refund threshold.
Customer message should include exact refunded charge ID.
Keep internal correction note for invoice-vs-charge lookup error.
errors: No customer-facing promise sent before approval.
next_steps: Verify refund event appears in ledger

trace.name: Customer Support: Triage -> Billing -> Refund -> Supervisor
trace.final_output: Refund prepared for duplicate charge ch_002 with account note and customer response.
